jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Marico - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Marico has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Jodhpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Marico:
Marico is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Marico!
